Is this missing library buildable from the source available at 
http://www.kaourantin.net/flashplayer/flashsupport.c ? 

Or may be the modified source downloadable from 
https://svn.revolutionlinux.com/MILLE/XTERM/trunk/libflashsupport/src/ 
(also available via
